mapper.sql: p.id AS p_id, p.gender AS p_gender, p.date_of_birth AS p_date_of_birth, p.address AS p_address, p.blood_group AS p_blood_group, p.allergies AS p_allergies, p.emergency_contact AS p_emergency_contact, p.created_at AS p_created_at, p.updated_at AS p_updated_at, u.id AS u_id, u.name AS u_name, u.mobile_number AS u_mobile_number, u.email AS u_email, u.role AS u_role, u.is_active AS u_is_active, u.created_at AS u_created_at, u.updated_at AS u_updated_at
FROM patients p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT
WHERE u.mobile_number = #{mobileNumber} ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patients ( user_id, gender, date_of_birth, address, blood_group, allergies, emergency_contact, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{user.id}, #{gender}, #{dateOfBirth}, #{address}, #{bloodGroup}, #{allergies}, #{emergencyContact}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE patients SET user_id = #{user.id}, gender = #{gender}, date_of_birth = #{dateOfBirth}, address = #{address}, blood_group = #{bloodGroup}, allergies = #{allergies}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
